weather_line: Northeast winds freshening · ducks aligned · third notation translated at last

stories.headline: Northeast by Nightfall: A Departure Date Is Named; the Route Is Committed to; the Northeast Receives Them at the Hour the Chart Implied
body: At seven forty-one Thursday morning, Christine set down her cup, looked at the unfolded Hempworth chart, and named the date. It was today. Steve, who had translated the third marginal notation sometime between last night and this morning — it read, in his handwriting, 'Thursday if the ducks agree' — confirmed that the ducks agreed. Both brass figures were facing northeast. The Jeep was already warm.

The northeastern route, traced to the edge by Christine's hand on Wednesday and committed to in the way that charts are committed to only once — finally, without reservation — ran through the fog-wreathed ridgelines and hollow country as Hempworth had marked it, which is to say correctly. The secondary terrain held. The sandstone presented no argument. Steve handled a difficult left-hand approach with the composure of a man whose vehicle forgives him nightly and has recently been given fresh cause.

The Prophet's expedition desk notes that this arc opened quietly, on a Sunday afternoon, with nothing more than a Jeep parked facing northeast and a man looking at it from a specific angle. It has resolved, as the best of them do, with the thing simply happening — at the hour the chart implied, in the direction the ducks had been pointing all along. The northeast has been visited. The table has another route on it. The brass ducks are still.

stories.headline: Gringotts Marks Two Consecutive Weeks Without a Statute Invocation; Duty Goblin Credits 'Environmental Factors'; Christine Is Not Listed as an Environmental Factor, Which Is Its Own Kind of Recognition
stories.byline: By our Diagon Alley banking correspondent
body: Gringotts Bank quietly marked a full fortnight Thursday without a formal Statute invocation, a Luminous Unattended Items consultation, or a procedural irregularity requiring Senior Liaison intervention before the first cup of tea. The duty goblin attributed this to 'environmental factors' and offered no further elaboration.

Christine, who has spent the fortnight closing the Briefcase matter, correcting the Accord's third sub-clause, and earning a second brass plaque in the Liaison Wing corridor, was not on the premises to receive this distinction. She was, at the time of the announcement, approximately forty minutes northeast of the kitchen table, on a route that the goblins would describe — if they described things, which they prefer not to — as entirely satisfactory.

stories.headline: Ministry Issues Thursday Bulletin Confirming Thursday; Notes With Apparent Surprise That the Week Is Nearly Finished; Attaches a Map That, Upon Inspection, Is Simply the Previous Map Rotated
body: The Ministry of Magic released its Thursday bulletin at nine-oh-five, confirming that Thursday was occurring and that the week was, by the Ministry's own accounting, approaching its conclusion. The bulletin noted this development with what the Prophet's ministry correspondent characterised as 'a tone adjacent to disbelief.'

Attached to the bulletin was a map. Analysts studying the document observed that it bore a close resemblance to Monday's map of the Diagon Alley back-room-in-question, with the notable difference that it had been rotated ninety degrees clockwise. The Ministry, when asked whether this was intentional, issued a supplementary bulletin confirming that the question had been received. A glowing object was not mentioned. This is either reassuring or a method.

stories.headline: Household Thursday: Route Settled, Ducks Still, One Vacancy Contested; the Warmest Lap Question Enters Its Second Week Without a Ruling
body: With Christine and Steve northeast of the household by mid-morning, Thursday's domestic affairs proceeded under the customary arrangements. The warmest lap question, unresolved since Wednesday's re-organisation, moved into its second week; Jersey, reached for comment via his preferred location on the sofa arm, declined to acknowledge that a second week had begun and maintained his position with the serenity of a gentleman who regards unresolved questions as a form of permanent residency.

Ellie spent the late morning in the hallway regarding the brass ducks on the shelf with an expression the household staff described as 'thoughtful, in the sense that something was occurring in that direction.' Lucy was not in the kitchen when the biscuit tin was briefly unattended at eight fifty-three. The biscuit tin was later found to be one short. These facts are presented without conclusion, as no conclusion is available.

familiars_corner: Lucy: Was not in the kitchen at eight fifty-three, has not been in any kitchen, does not know where kitchens are, and wishes to note for the record that the brass ducks are also not above suspicion.

Ellie: Spent eleven minutes in the hallway looking at the ducks, concluded that they had moved since yesterday, considered this information carefully, and decided it was probably fine — possibly good, even.
Jersey: The sofa arm is warm. The lap question remains open. Thursday, Jersey has determined, is structurally identical to Wednesday in all the ways that matter.
founding_editor_note: Northeast is a fine direction — I built the presses to face northeast, for the light. The bracket's still holding, incidentally. No one has asked, but it is. — D.

in_brief.sport: Gringotts Weightlifting Invitational: entries open; duty goblin has noted that the trophy bracket was installed by an amateur and is visibly crooked, a remark that has been forwarded to the Founding Editor's portrait for response.
in_brief.forecast: Clear northeast through the afternoon · fog at the hollows by dusk · brass ducks settled and not expected to move before morning.

storyline_updates.title: Northeast by Nightfall
storyline_updates.summary: Resolved Thursday morning: departure named at seven forty-one, northeastern route committed to, destination reached at the hour the chart implied. Third marginal notation translated ('Thursday if the ducks agree') — ducks agreed. Steve's approach on the difficult left-hand section rated without a qualifier, which is its own rating. Arc closed with full honours. The brass ducks are still. The kitchen table has space.

storyline_updates.title: The Duck Bandit Stirs Again
storyline_updates.summary: New arc opening: upon returning from the northeast route, Steve found a single rubber duck on the Jeep's bonnet — still damp, placed with evident deliberateness, facing the same direction as the brass ducks on the shelf. No footprints. The last Duck Bandit appearance was weeks ago, and this duck is a different colour than the previous ones. Day 2 should establish whether the colour is meaningful, whether a second duck appears, and whether the direction it faces is a message or a coincidence — which in Duck Bandit matters has historically been the same thing.
